story.text:
# 💡 C53 · Mythological bnot-Pair Readings
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Every canonical bnot-pair on the lattice admits a mythological reading; classical pantheons encode dihedral structure pre-formally. Observation (status open). Tome III Acts III.5–III.8.

## Edges in

- [[Tome III Act 7: The First Complement-Pair]] *introduces* →
